metadata.name: Stop Payment on a Lost Claim Check

description: A beneficiary reports that they lost their life insurance claim check and needs a new one.

nodes.task_description: Identify the beneficiary and the claim payment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the claim and the specific payment details.

nodes.task_description: Check if the original check has been cashed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the check has not yet been cashed.

nodes.task_description: Place a stop payment on the lost check and reissue a new one.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully stops the old check and issues a new payment.
